scope: GEO/AEO/LLMO/AI brand visibility, llms.txt, AI-readable publishing, answer monitoring, citation/source authority, intent mining, content optimization
local_system_strengths: DeepSeek and Tencent Yuanbao answer capture
per-answer GEO scoring across visibility, accuracy, evidence inclusion, recommendation force
competitive share-of-voice and citation source weighting
major_gaps: llms.txt and llms-full.txt generation and validation
robots.txt, sitemap.xml, ai.txt, Schema/JSON-LD, canonical and AI crawler rule audit
website crawling and LLM-friendly Markdown conversion
source authority catalog with verified domains and ownership
multi-run time-series database, alerts and regression gates
multi-model API collection for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity and Google AI Overview

capability_layers.name: Intent and prompt universe
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Create intent_library.json with industry, brand, competitor, funnel stage and evidence requirements.

capability_layers.name: Multi-engine answer monitoring
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Add provider abstraction for API and web UI collectors with a unified answer/reference schema.

capability_layers.name: Brand visibility and GEO scoring
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Add time-series aggregates by platform, intent, brand and competitor.

capability_layers.name: Citation and source authority
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Create source_authority_catalog.json and map citations to official, regulatory, academic, media, community, competitor and dealer classes.

capability_layers.name: Technical AI discoverability audit
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Build site_audit with llms.txt, robots, sitemap, schema, canonical, content structure and crawler accessibility checks.

capability_layers.name: LLM-readable publishing
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Generate llms.txt and llms-full.txt from sitemap, crawled pages, Markdown docs and curated source assets.

capability_layers.name: Crawling and Markdown conversion
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Add lightweight crawler and optional document conversion for PDFs, docs, HTML and knowledge-base assets.

capability_layers.name: Content optimization and rewrite experiments
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Create optimizer_lab with candidate generator, evaluator, fidelity guard and experiment runner.

capability_layers.name: SERP and Google AI Overview monitoring
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Add SERP/AIO collector via API provider or Playwright where permitted.

capability_layers.name: CI, scheduling and regression
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Add baseline.json, scheduled GitHub Action and threshold-based regression reports.

capability_layers.name: CMS and framework plugins
capability_layers.recommended_fusion: Defer plugin work; first output static files and patches, then adapt to client stacks.
